stat.title: Rally Killers
stat.subtitle: GIDPs with a runner on second (or worse).

notableEvents.label: Alec Bohm rally-killer GIDP · Bot 1
notableEvents.detail: Alec Bohm grounds into a double play, third baseman Tommy Edman to second baseman Miguel Rojas to first baseman Freddie Freeman. Kyle Schwarber out at 2nd. Alec Bohm out at 1st.
